rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, did it anyway, that's a round won clean. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, changed in the men's change room — the poncho was on but the choice was made, so that one's a draw at worst. The Apollo ring and necklace at work though? That one went to them — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading too gay, named it clearly but still didn't wear it.
pattern: They're quiet with strangers and shoppers, loud the second his actual world is watching.
